_meta.description: Legal reasoning scaffolds to force clause-first analysis, definition resolution, and bounded recommendations.

rules.description: Use exact clause extraction first, then map obligations, exceptions, and rights per party.
steps: Identify clause boundaries and section anchors.
Locate all definition blocks and map each defined term to every downstream clause.
Isolate obligations, permissions, conditions, and remedies in separate groups.
Require exact phrase + location capture for each legal claim.
Flag unresolved references before producing any summary.

rules.description: Build risk impacts from termination/liability/governance clauses only using source text.
steps: Collect all termination triggers and cure periods with location.
Collect all indemnity, limitation, and remedy clauses with exceptions and caps.
Cross-validate governing law/forum/jurisdiction fields against defined terms.
Produce risk labels with confidence bands and explicit uncertainties.
Emit escalation recommendations only as options, never as certainties.

rules.description: Detect clause shifts across versioned docs and call out precedence language.
steps: Align sections by heading, version, and clause reference IDs.
Compare term text for additions, deletions, and replaced obligations.
List clause-level differences with source anchors for both versions.
Mark conflicts where interpretation changes require legal review.

rules.description: Prioritize operational monitoring outputs with mandatory clause links.
steps: Extract all time-bound commitments and notification requirements.
Map deadlines to source section and signature block.
Attach owner and fallback if owner is absent.
Mark tasks as incomplete when citations are missing.

scaffolds.description: Use the strongest supported interpretation backed by exact clauses and tagged uncertainty.
steps: Prioritize definition sections before applying obligations.
Map all operative clause variants with evidence locations.
Resolve precedence and exception ordering before recommendation drafting.
Flag any inference beyond explicit text.

optionsFramework.label: Conservative interpretation
optionsFramework.description: Default to strict text and flag ambiguities when any clause is unclear.

optionsFramework.label: Balanced interpretation
optionsFramework.description: Report likely intent with evidence-supported assumptions and explicit uncertainty windows.

optionsFramework.label: Assertive interpretation
optionsFramework.description: Present strongest reasonable reading with clause priority rationale and conflict markers.

rules: Must include exact text and location for every obligation.
Must include party-role mapping for each row.
Must include contradiction markers for cross-references.
Must include triggers, cure windows, and consequences.
Must cite governing law and dispute resolution where available.
Must include unresolved items as follow-up questions.
